_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Shetland Annual Report 2024/25. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2024/25?
queries.expected_answer: Net expenditure for the year ended 31 March 2025: £89,946,000

queries.question: What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2024/25?
queries.expected_answer: The Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2024/25 was £84,594,000.

queries.question: Did NHS Shetland report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2024/25?
queries.expected_answer: NHS Shetland had a surplus against its core Revenue Resource limit (RRL) of £16,000 in 2024/25.

queries.question: What was the total operating expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2024/25?
